title: Dinosaur Excavation Kit, Educational Fossil Discovery Set for Ages 5+, T-Rex Skeleton Dig
features: EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Perfect archaeological learning kit for children aged 5 and up, combining hands-on excavation with prehistoric discovery
COMPLETE KIT: Includes excavation block with hidden dinosaur fossils, digging tools, brush, and detailed instructions for a full palaeontology experience
SKILL DEVELOPMENT: Enhances fine motor skills, patience, and scientific curiosity through careful excavation of T-Rex skeleton pieces
AUTHENTIC EXPERIENCE: Realistic fossil dig simulation allows children to uncover and assemble their own prehistoric T-Rex skeleton
ENGAGING ACTIVITY: Provides hours of focused entertainment while teaching about dinosaurs and archaeological techniques
description: Product Description Unleash your child's inner palaeontologist with this exciting Dino Discovery Excavation Kit! Perfect for young scientists aged 5 and up, this hands-on educational kit lets children experience the thrill of discovering dinosaur fossils. The set includes a specially prepared dig block containing a T-Rex skeleton waiting to be uncovered, along with proper excavation tools - a hammer and chiselling implements designed for safe exploration. As children carefully chip away at the block, they'll develop patience and fine motor skills while learning about prehistoric life. The process mirrors real archaeological techniques, making this both an entertaining and educational activity. The completed T-Rex skeleton can be assembled to create an impressive fossilised prehistoric beast, perfect for display and imaginative play. This kit provides hours of engaging entertainment while teaching children about dinosaurs, fossils, and scientific discovery methods. It's an ideal gift for budding scientists and dinosaur enthusiasts who love hands-on learning experiences. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months. Chocking hazard - small parts
